retrieved_note: Pilot extraction from official public pages and official MID / annual-fee criteria PDFs. Normalize before shipping to UI.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Second year onwards: 1.5x credit limit in 3 months after fee charge, capped at PKR 800,000 and floored at PKR 200,000. First-year fee may be reversed on digital acquisition or spend promotion.

notes: Self-employed minimum age is 25 on public pages.
Official eligibility flow asks for income proof and does not surface any deposit threshold for this unsecured credit-card product.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Second year onwards: 1.5x credit limit in 3 months after fee charge, capped at PKR 900,000 and floored at PKR 600,000. First-year fee can be reversed based on spend promotion.

notes: Official apply-now page explicitly states minimum monthly salary / income of PKR 500,000.
No deposit threshold is surfaced on the public eligibility or apply pages for this unsecured credit-card product.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Annual fee reversal is available under the 2026 criteria, but the annual fee amount itself was not surfaced cleanly in the official pages reviewed.

notes: Self-employed minimum age is 25 on public pages.

Current official Titanium product pages expose eligibility, but the current public conventional Summary Box / MID fee grid surfaced for Pakistan lists Platinum, World, and Easy Credit only, so annual_fee_pkr remains null.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Second year onwards: 200,000 or 70% of card limit for primary; 100,000 or 70% of card limit for supplementary within 3 months after fee charge.

notes: Self-employed minimum age is 25 on public pages.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: First-year annual fee waiver at PKR 200,000 or 70% of card limit for primary and PKR 100,000 or 70% for supplementary; annual fee applies if Priority criteria are not maintained.

notes: Minimum monthly salary / income is inferred from the official apply-now form's lowest selectable income band, which starts at PKR 100,000; the public page does not state the threshold in prose.

gaps: No clean public debit-card fee/eligibility pages were surfaced in this pass.
Some credit-card products on the landing page expose eligibility while others do not.
